description_long: This fishing rod features a slender, elongated shaft with a subtle gradient from pink to white, equipped with a metallic spinning reel attached near the handle. The handle is constructed from a light brown, possibly cork or EVA foam material, providing a comfortable grip, and is capped with a darker end. The rod is fitted with several evenly spaced line guides, which are metallic and circular, running from the handle to the tip. The reel seat is visible and appears to be made of metal and plastic, securely holding the reel in place. The overall design is lightweight and streamlined, suitable for recreational fishing in urban parks or waterfronts. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the rod.
description: A slender, pink-to-white fishing rod with a metallic spinning reel, cork-like handle, and multiple metal line guides. The design is lightweight and ergonomic, ideal for urban fishing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rod, the pink-to-white gradient, and the attached spinning reel with the handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular arrangement of the line guides and the compact profile of the reel and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rod's length, the reel attachment, and the handle's ergonomic shape.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the alignment of the line guides and the detailed structure of the reel and handle.
attribute_reel_attachment: A visible reel seat is present, made of metal and plastic, securely holding a spinning reel with a standard locking mechanism.
attribute_line_guides: There are five metallic line guides, evenly spaced along the rod, with a single-footed design and a silver finish. The guides are circular and attached with dark wrappings.
attribute_handle_type: The handle is a full grip type, made from light brown cork or EVA foam, cylindrical in shape, and ergonomically contoured for comfort.
attribute_brand_logo: No brand logo or marking is visible on the rod.
attribute_tip_flexibility: The rod tip appears to be light to medium in flexibility, suitable for general freshwater fishing.
